workflow-item.name: item1
workflow-item.script:
function Handler($context, $inputs) { $inputsString = $inputs | ConvertTo-Json -Compress Write-Host "Inputs were $inputsString" $output=@{status = 'done'}
Set-PowerCLIConfiguration -InvalidCertificateAction Ignore -Confirm:$false #Set-PowerCLIConfiguration -Scope User -ParticipateInCEIP $true
# vCenter details $vCenter = "10.225.1.11" $vcUser = "administrator@vsphere.local" $vcPass = "VMware123!VMware123!"
# VM and Tag details $vmName = "photon-lite" $tagName = "Manish"
# Connect to vCenter Connect-VIServer -Server $vCenter -User $vcUser -Password $vcPass
# Get VM $vm = Get-VM -Name $vmName
Write-Host "vm name is '$vm'"
if (-not $vm) { throw "VM '$vmName' not found." }
# Get Tag $tag = Get-Tag -Name $tagName
if (-not $tag) { throw "Tag '$tagName' not found." }
# Assign Tag to VM New-TagAssignment -Entity $vm -Tag $tag
Write-Host "Tag '$tagName' assigned to VM '$vmName' successfully."
# Disconnect Disconnect-VIServer -Server $vCenter -Confirm:$false
return $output }
workflow-item.description: Simple task with custom script capability.
